title: WHOIS Lookup
subtitle: Find out who owns a domain, when it expires, and other public registration details.

info.title: What is WHOIS?
info.text: WHOIS is a widely used internet record listing that identifies who owns a domain and how to get in contact with them. The Internet Corporation for Assigned Names and Numbers (ICANN) regulates domain name registration and ownership.
useItems: Find out when a domain is expiring
Contact domain owners for purchase inquiries
Check where a domain's DNS is hosted
